botPage.title: Explore Our Ecosystem
botPage.description: Discover the specialized bots that power thriving communities. From moderation to entertainment, we have you covered.

changelogPage.title: Changelog & Updates
changelogPage.description: Stay up to date with the latest features, improvements, and bug fixes for our bots across the Luxora ecosystem.

items.title: Improved Filtering & Rate Limits
changes: Upgraded the spam detection algorithm to handle advanced obfuscation techniques.
Added dynamic rate limits for active group chats to reduce false positives.
Optimized database queries for faster response times during peak loads.
Fixed an issue where silent messages were incorrectly triggering the mute function.

items.title: Custom Captcha Implementation
changes: Introduced a customizable math block captcha for all new joiners.
Admins can now set custom welcome messages with dynamic variables ({name} and {id}).
Added auto-deletion for welcome messages after 5 minutes.

items.title: Initial Website Launch
changes: Launched the official Luxora Bot brand website.
Introduced the bot directory and showcase section for easier discovery.
Implemented dark mode and responsive design across all pages.
Added a global changelog track to centralize bot update info.

contactPage.title: Get in Touch
contactPage.description: Have questions, need support, or want to discuss a partnership? Choose the best way to reach our team below.
contactPage.footerNote1: We typically respond to emails within 24-48 hours.
contactPage.footerNote2: For urgent matters, please use the Telegram Support Bot.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: Your privacy is critically important to us at the **Luxora Bot Project**. This Privacy Policy outlines what data we collect, why we collect it, and how we handle your personal information when you use our Telegram bots and services.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: When you interact with our bots on Telegram, we collect certain basic information provided by the Telegram API to ensure the proper functionality of our services. The data we collect includes:
list: **Telegram User ID:** A unique numerical identifier assigned to your account by Telegram. This is required to identify you across sessions and manage your interactions with the bot.
**Name:** Your first name and last name as displayed on your Telegram profile.
**Usage Data:** Information about how you interact with our bots, including commands used and timestamps, to improve our services and detect abuse.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: The data we collect is used strictly for the following purposes:
list: To provide, operate, and maintain our bots and services.
To personalize your experience and deliver content relevant to your requests.
To authenticate users and manage access to certain bot features.
To improve, test, and troubleshoot our bots.
To enforce our terms of service and prevent malicious activity or abuse.

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing and Disclosure
sections.content: We **do not** sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. We may share your data only in the following circumstances:
list: **Service Providers:** We may share data with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our infrastructure (such as database hosting), subject to strict confidentiality agreements.
**Legal Requirements:** We may disclose your information if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities.

sections.title: 4. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your Telegram data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. If you stop using our bots or block them, we may periodically clean up inactive user data from our databases. However, basic records (such as your User ID) may be kept longer for security and anti-abuse purposes.

sections.title: 5. Security of Your Data
sections.content: We value your trust in providing us with your personal data. We use commercially acceptable means of protecting it, including secure database storage and encrypted connections. However, please remember that no method of transmission over the internet, or method of electronic storage, is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

sections.title: 6. Your Data Rights
sections.content: Depending on your location, you may have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data held by us. If you wish to delete your data from our systems, you can typically do so by stopping your usage of the bots and contacting us directly.

sections.title: 7. Changes to This Privacy Policy
sections.content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

sections.title: 8. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions or suggestions about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us via our official Telegram channel or support bot.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: Welcome to the **Luxora Bot Project**. By accessing and using our bots, services, and website, you agree to comply with the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before using our services.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By using or adding any Luxora Bot to your server or group, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms of Service along with our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

sections.title: 2. Description of Service
sections.content: Luxora Bots provides automation, moderation, entertainment, and other utility functionalities within the Telegram platform. Services are provided "as is" and may be updated, modified, or discontinued at any time without prior notice.

sections.title: 3. User Conduct and Restrictions
sections.content: Users must ensure compliance with Telegram’s Terms of Service when utilizing our bots. Prohibited uses include, but are not limited to:
list: Using our bots to distribute illegal, harmful, or spam content.
Spamming our infrastructure through excessive bot requests.
Attempting to exploit, hack, or reverse-engineer the bot framework.
Violating the privacy of other users or collecting their data without consent.

sections.title: 4. Group Administrator Responsibilities
sections.content: As the entity inviting these bots into your group or channel, you are fully responsible for their configuration and any impact on your community due to improper use. We are not liable for damages caused by bot misconfiguration.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: The Luxora Bot Project and its developers shall not be held liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of our services. The service operates on a best-effort basis, and 100% uptime is not guaranteed.

sections.title: 6. Changes to these Terms
sections.content: The Luxora Bot Project reserves the right to revise these Terms at any time. Continued use of our services after any modifications signifies acceptance of the new terms and conditions.
